observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with coating fault
Localized deviation from normal pill appearance
mechanism_explanation: Uneven coating application or formulation error causes visual defects.
severity_visual_description: minor color deviation visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Adjust spray nozzle distance and coating viscosity.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the color deviation would be absent and surface appears normal.
